# Jurocompliant
# Last updated: 2026-05-26

Jurocompliant is a non-custodial website compliance scanner for the DPDP Act 2023 (India), GDPR (EU), and DORA (EU). It scans any public URL for consent gaps, pre-consent tracking, and missing privacy notices — mapping findings to specific regulatory provisions.

## Key facts
- Supported regulations: DPDP Act 2023, GDPR, DORA
- Surface scanner: Free, no account required
- Parent brand: jecertis.com

## Links
- Homepage: https://jurocompliant.com/
- Self-assessment: https://jurocompliant.com/checklist.html
- Blog: https://jurocompliant.com/blog/
- Documentation: https://docs.jurocompliant.com/
- Privacy: https://jurocompliant.com/privacy.html
- Contact: help@jurocompliant.com

## Blog
Technical compliance articles for CTOs and engineering leads. No consultant speak.

### Published articles
- [DPDP Phase II: Consent Manager Requirements Before November 2026](https://jurocompliant.com/blog/dpdp-phase-ii-consent-managers) — What the consent manager framework requires from India SaaS companies, the two compliance paths (consent manager vs. §7 legitimate use), and the engineering work most teams underestimate. Published 2026-05-27.
- [DORA RTS Article 28 vs SOC 2: The Gap Map](https://jurocompliant.com/dora-soc2-gap) — Maps the four structural gaps between DORA RTS Article 28 obligations and SOC 2 coverage: contractual audit rights, exit and transition plans, incident notification timelines, and subcontracting chain visibility. For India SaaS companies selling to EU financial entities. Published 2026-06-02.
- [DPDP Processor Obligations for Call Recording Stacks](https://jurocompliant.com/blog/dpdp-processor-guide) — What India's DPDP Act 2023 requires of data processors who handle call recordings: §8(1) security safeguards, §8(7) deletion obligations, §8(6) breach notification, and §10 SDF designation risk. For CTOs and Heads of Engineering at CPaaS and cloud telephony companies. Published 2026-05-26.

## Disambiguation
- [Which Juro?](https://jurocompliant.com/which-juro) — Disambiguation: Juro (juro.com) is contract management; Jurocompliant (jurocompliant.com) is a GDPR/DPDP/DORA compliance scanner. Published 2026-05-27.
